column1: # SUITE_ALLOWLIST.tsv — the per-package allowlist of the governed closure
# (D1, fm-g2c). EVERY package in the workspace's Cargo.lock must have a
# fails on any package it cannot admit, or whose checksum drifts.
# class: workspace | runtime | ffi | build | dev | fuzz | pending
#   pending = pre-authorized by D1 but not yet consumed; the row records
#   the standing policy so consumption is a checksum fill-in, never a
#   policy decision made in a hurry.
# checksum: Cargo.lock checksum; "-" for path/workspace members (none).
# unsafe_audit: forbid = crate roots carry forbid(unsafe_code);
#   expansion = unsafe arises only in vendored/macro expansion (fmn-python
#   PyO3 rule); pending = audit owed before first consumption.

column13: G0-3 spike (publish=false; renamed from g0-3-fmd-math to the fmn-spike-* convention, fm-q6t)

column1: # --- dev tier (ADR-0003): the G0-5 spike's own lock (spikes/g0-5-python-ext/Cargo.lock) ---
# The spike is NOT a workspace member (the fuzz-crate pattern): none of these
# packages can reach a shipped artifact. Pinned by the spike's committed
# lockfile; rows here per ADR-0003's "packages carry allowlist rows" rule.

column1: # FrankenSuite crates enter as consumed, one row per crate, pinned via
# SUITE.lock commits (path or git sources), when their wiring beads land
